trans-unit.source: You must assign all quantity in order to post. Quantity is %1. Qty. to Assign is %2.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit IT4G-Charge Assigment - NamedType QtyNotAssignedErr

trans-unit.source: Related item ledger entries cannot be found.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit IT4G-Charge Assigment - NamedType RelatedItemLedgEntriesNotFoundErr
Codeunit IT4G-Charge Assigment - Method PostItemChargePerRcpt - NamedType ReceiptLinesDeletedErr

Page IT4G-Check Apothemata - Action CheckEntris - Property Caption
Page IT4G-Check Apothemata - Action Empty - Property Caption
Page IT4G-Check Apothemata - Action ILE - Property Caption

Page IT4G-Check Apothemata - Action SSCCE - Property Caption

Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData MarkId field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control myData MarkId - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the myData Transaction Errors field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control myData Transaction Errors - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the No. Series field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control No. Series - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the posting date for this document.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Posting Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipment Date - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipment Method Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Shipment Reason field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipment Reason RCGRBASE - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipping Agent Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code for the service, such as a one-day delivery, that is offered by the shipping agent.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Shipping Agent Service Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Transfer Reason field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer Reason RCGRBASE - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the location that items are transferred from.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-from Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the sender at the location that the items are transferred from.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-from Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the location that the items are transferred to.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-to Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the recipient at the location that the items are transferred to.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Control Transfer-to Name - Property ToolTip
Page IT4G-Posted Transfer Shipments - Action Send Electronic Invoice Manually - Property Caption
Page IT4G-Temp Cust. Order Header - Property Caption

Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Destination Location Code field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Destination Location Code - Property ToolTip
Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control No. of Items - Property ToolTip
Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control No. of Orders - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of the entry.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Description - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies information in addition to the description of the item being transferred.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Description 2 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the document number that is associated with the line or entry.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Document No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the item that will be transferred.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Item No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Line No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Line No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the value of the Prod. Order No. field.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Prod. Order No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity of items that remains to be received.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Qty. to Receive - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity of items that remain to be shipped.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Qty. to Ship - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the quantity of the item that will be processed as the document stipulates.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Quantity - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Control Variant Code - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Create a mass shipment for the selected location.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Action Post - Property ToolTip
Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Action Post - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Refresh the list with the latest data.
trans-unit.note: Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Action RefreshList - Property ToolTip
Page IT4G-Fason Shipment - Action RefreshList - Property Caption
